results.name: fixed internal ring to orbit pinion pitch
hand crank pinion to cage drive gear pitch
fixed ring and orbit pinion tooth tip clearance
hand crank and cage drive tooth tip clearance
fixed ring plane separated from drive plane
results.message: Drive gear Z25-29 and internal ring Z38-42 are separated by 9 mm.

results.name: orbit pinion support avoids drive plane
results.message: Cage uses split lower and upper orbit support pillars, leaving both the drive gear plane and hand-crank sweep plane open.

results.name: cage drive gear connected to central journal
results.message: A printed drive web connects the cage drive gear hub to the central bearing journal, so hand-crank torque has a physical load path into the cage.

results.name: orbit shaft supports connected to cage body
results.message: Lower and upper orbit shaft supports are tied back to the central journal with bridges, avoiding floating support solids after STEP import.

results.name: 608ZZ actual 8mm bore to cage journal clearance
fixed ring physically seated on base standoffs
results.message: Base standoffs now reach the fixed ring Z38 plane with printed seats, eliminating the previous 2 mm floating support gap.

results.name: hand crank shaft has upper bushing support
results.message: A fixed upper bushing above the crank hub supports the 3 mm hand shaft and reduces gear mesh tilt under manual load.

results.name: axial retainers and spacers represented
results.message: Central bearing tabs, cage spacers, orbit pinion retainers, and hand crank thrust collar are modeled with at least 0.5 mm running gaps.
